peripherals.label: Quectel BG770A Cellular
peripherals.summary: LTE-M / NB-IoT cellular modem with the full Quectel AT command surface.
peripherals.detail: Byte-exact V.250 + Quectel +QI*/+QMT*/+QHTTP*/+QGPS*/+QSSL* state machines, validated against real BG770A-GL hardware captures. Firmware sends AT commands, modem replies stream back over UART.

config_keys.name: apn
config_keys.doc: APN to set on the PDP context (e.g. "internet").

config_keys.name: rssi
config_keys.doc: Initial signal strength reported by AT+CSQ (0..99).

config_keys.name: ber
config_keys.doc: Initial bit-error-rate reported by AT+CSQ (0..99, defaults to 99).

config_keys.name: boot_urcs
config_keys.doc: If true, the modem emits the cold-boot URC sequence on attach.

config_keys.name: auto_attach
config_keys.doc: If true, the modem reports itself already registered + attached at boot.

peripherals.label: NEO-6M GPS
peripherals.summary: GPS module streaming NMEA sentences over UART RX.
peripherals.detail: GGA + RMC sentences with XOR checksum, generated entirely in the Rust core. Firmware echoes the stream back to the host UART.

config_keys.name: lat_deg
config_keys.doc: Initial latitude in decimal degrees (paired with lon_deg).

config_keys.name: lon_deg
config_keys.doc: Initial longitude in decimal degrees (paired with lat_deg).
